---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem in DPFTS guidance, examples, docs, or release files
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What is wrong?

Describe the problem clearly.

## File or section

Example: `deep/remote-events.md`, `recipes/shop.md`, `README.md`

## Why it matters

Does it cause unsafe Roblox code, confusing advice, bad Luau, broken Markdown, or stale installation instructions?

## Suggested fix

If you know the fix, describe it.

## Safety check

Does this bug affect security, DataStores, purchases, rewards, admin actions, or player data?
